notes:
The game runs pretty much perfectly at 60 fps after the following trick to prevent Uplay client from updating (you have to run the game once in order to create the WINE prefix):
1) Go to (your_steam_library_folder)/steamapps/compatdata/354380/pfx/drive_c/Program Files (x86)/Ubisoft/Ubisoft Game Launcher.
2) Open version.txt file and note the version number.
3) Download this Uplay version: https://web.archive.org/web/20180927054350/http://ubi.li/4vxt9.
4) Using winetricks or protontricks, uninstall Uplay and then install the version you've just downloaded ("Select the default wineprefix" > "Run uninstaller").
5) Run the game.
I give this one only a bronze rating, because once you've exited the game, you can't  run it again (the game window opens, you hear an intro sound for a couple of seconds, then the window closes). The solution is to reinstall Uplay once more and then you can run the game.
title: Assassin’s Creed® Chronicles: China

notes: The game crashes approximately every ten minutes without an error message.
title: Assassin’s Creed® Chronicles: China

notes: The game runs with DXVK but has many graphics issues (e.g. the models of the characters aren't seen). But after adding "PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1" to the launch options those issues are gone. The performance is quite good (~30 fps on my non-gaming laptop), and I haven't run into any problems so far.
title: Assassin’s Creed® Chronicles: China

cpu: AMD A10-7860K Radeon R7, 12 Compute Cores 4C+8G
notes:
In my experience:
Lutris 0.5.2, 
Install NET 4.5 Wine prefix,
Uplay Offline mode,
Overlay off,
In game FPS 30~57 and
In Menu or Training 45~61
title: Assassin’s Creed® Chronicles: China

notes: Finally the game runs perfectly out of the box. No issues whatsoever.
title: Assassin’s Creed® Chronicles: China

notes: Upon launching the game, uplay client got installed, logged into it, the game started running only in the background. I could see its service running in the background but the game never got launched. I did wait for a couple of minutes. Killed all the related processes, relaunched the game, but it still won't start. It just keeps running in the background.
title: Assassin’s Creed® Chronicles: China
